topics.title: Make Your Roblox Avatar MOVE Like a Pro: Animation Priority Explained!
topics.angle: Beginner-friendly walkthrough of Roblox Studio animation priorities (Core/Idle/Movement/Action) — why your custom dance keeps getting overridden and how to fix it in 4 clicks. Inspired by the new Animation Priority Guide trending on DevForum. Includes a kid-friendly analogy (loud voices vs whispers) and one screenshot-by-screenshot fix.

topics.title: 5 Secret Wall-Jump Tricks Every Roblox Obby Kid Should Steal
topics.angle: Quick-hit lifehack focused ONLY on advanced wall-jump mechanics (corner boosts, double-tap rhythm, camera tilt trick). Distinct from earlier Tower of Hell guide — zero overlap, pure micro-skills. Fast read, high re-readability.

topics.title: Top 10 Roblox Items Worth Trading This Spring 2026 (Limiteds Edition)
topics.angle: Ranked list of currently-rising limiteds and seasonal items kids should hold or trade up. Different from previous 'how-to-trade-safe' posts — this one is concrete picks with current value trends, RAP movement, and a 'dad-approved' note on each.

topics.title: Roblox's New Voice Filter Lets You Sound Like Your Avatar — And the Internet Is Losing It
topics.angle: Fresh news angle: a viral voice-effect feature making rounds on TikTok where players sound like their character (robot, mouse, dragon). Covers what it is, where to enable it, the safety filter for kids, and the 3 funniest clips this week. Avoids prior 'Brainrots' and 'Green Bean' angles.

topics.title: Dad's Corner: I Tried Building My First Roblox Map (And I May Have Made a Disaster)
topics.angle: FaionEnder reviews his very first Studio attempt — a tiny obby for his daughter. Funny mishaps (gravity at 0, parts floating, accidentally deleted spawn), what he learned, and an honest dad-rating of Studio's friendliness for total beginners. Zero overlap with prior 99 Nights / movie / trusted-friend dad pieces.
